title: POV
overview: Ten people from different backgrounds and ethnicities vent their frustrations on how they believe they are being suppressed by society and laws of government. First individually to a reporter before they confront each other on their prejudices towards themselves. Unknown to them they are being observed by a member of Al-Qaida who plans to use their biases against them.
